11 PRVNTRNO PRVDR_INT_NUM Provider Internal Number CHAR 10 This field is used as a key to uniquely identify a provider in the CSP_PRVDR table.
12 STATE_CD STATE_CD State Code CHAR 2 The two-digit state abbreviation.
13 SUBMSNDT SUBMSN_DT Submission Date DATE 8 The date the submission was received by the system.
